title: Judea Pearl - Cognitive Systems Laboratory

Pearl** , "Comments on Nick Huntington-Klein's review `Pearl before
economists: *The Book of Why* and empirical economics,'"
UCLA Cognitive Systems Laboratory,
Technical Report (R-524), January 2023. *Journal of Economic Methodology* , 30(1):63--67. https://doi.org/10.1080/1350178X.2023.2170859 **(R-523):** [[pdf]](https://ftp.cs.ucla.edu/pub/stat_ser/r523.pdf) [[bib]](https://ftp.cs.ucla.edu/pub/stat_ser/r523.bib) **J. Pearl** ,
"Causal Inference: History, Perspectives and Unification
(An Interview with Judea Pearl),"
UCLA Cognitive Systems Laboratory,
Technical Report (R-523), October 2022. This paper contains complete References of the published version in *Observational Studies* , 8(2):23-36, 2022. Special Issue titled "Rebels with a Cause: Monologues from Heckman, Pearl, Robins, and Rubin" [DOI: https://doi.org/10.1353/obs.2022.0007]. **(R-522):** [[pdf]](https://ftp.cs.ucla.edu/pub/stat_ser/r522-reprint.pdf) [[bib]](https://ftp.cs.ucla.edu/pub/stat_ser/r522.bib) **A.
